title: numbar
description: Makes durability bars, progress bars, XP, etc. show numeric values!
body:
This mod makes durability, cooldown, bundle capacity, XP, bossbars, health, armor, food, and breath bars into numbers. All bars are configurable in the mod config.

## Details

- Bossbars are measured from 0% to 100%
- The XP bar gets a number counting how many XP points until the next level
- Food also shows your saturation value in (parentheses)
- Absorption health is notated with a yellow "+N", where N is how many bonus hearts you have
- Bundle capacity, along with other non-durability item bars, are measured as a percentage
- Cooldown can be configured to be showed in seconds or ticks, but may be off by around a few ticks due to the game not exposing the cooldown timer directly
- The heart by the health meter will change with potion effects, freezing, hardcore, etc. 

## Sample image

![Minecraft hotbar, with durability, XP, health, armor, armor, and food replaced with various numbers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21b4480e6d61799bddf190af35de7cc230279b90.png)
